system.description:
Twisted Guards

Due to prison overcrowding, some criminals are sentenced to indentured service to a noble to work off their debt to society. This site's guardian uses criminals as guards, under the stern eye of professionals.

Are casualties high due to danger from intruders or other site defenses? Is the patron benevolent and trying to rehabilitate criminals, or using them as disposable fodder? How do the convicts like this place?

Dangers

Serving here is a known post among criminals, both a resume builder and networking site. Angering these guards could bring consequences from unexpected directions in the criminal underworld.

Hand picked as the hardest and deadliest, these criminal guards are canny and tough.

Remedies

Convicts are eager to assist anyone with enough Coin or pull to secure their pardon and freedom.

The convicts are bullied and sullen, as much a hindrance to defenders as a defense themselves.
